chapter_title.ar: باب حَدِّ الْقَطْعِ وَ كَيْفَ هُوَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 36 – Penalty (Hadd) of the cutting, and how it is to be

text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أُتِيَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بِرِجَالٍ قَدْ سَرَقُوا فَقَطَعَ أَيْدِيَهُمْ ثُمَّ قَالَ إِنَّ الَّذِي بَانَ مِنْ أَجْسَادِكُمْ قَدْ وَصَلَ إِلَى النَّارِ فَإِنْ تَتُوبُوا تَجُرُّوهَا وَ إِنْ لَمْ تَتُوبُوا تَجُرَّكُمْ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They came to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> with men who had stolen. So he cut their hands, then said: ‘That which has spearated from your bodies has arrived to the fire. So if you were to repent, you would pull it (out from the Fire of Hell), and if you do not repent, it would pull you (into the Fire of Hell)’.
